Level.name: Entity
Level.description: Identifies each catalog entity for reporting. (technical: uses entity_key and entity_name.)

Level.name: Term
Level.description: Identifies classification terms for analysis. (technical: uses term_key and term_name.)

Level.name: Glossary
Level.description: Groups entries by top‑level glossary. (technical: uses level_1_glossary.)

Level.name: Level 2
Level.description: Shows the second glossary hierarchy level for navigation. (technical: uses level_2.)

Level.name: Level 3
Level.description: Shows the third glossary hierarchy level for navigation. (technical: uses level_3.)

Level.name: Level 4
Level.description: Shows the fourth glossary hierarchy level for navigation. (technical: uses level_4.)

Level.name: Level 5
Level.description: Shows the fifth glossary hierarchy level for navigation. (technical: uses level_5.)

Level.name: Level 6
Level.description: Shows the leaf glossary level (may be a term or category). (technical: uses level_6.)

Level.name: Leaf Name
Level.description: Displays the leaf label. (technical: uses leaf_name, the last FQDN segment.)

Level.name: Is Leaf Term
Level.description: Flags whether the leaf is a term (true/false). (technical: uses is_leaf_term.)

Level.name: Hierarchy Depth
Level.description: Shows how deep the glossary path is. (technical: uses hierarchy_depth.)

Level.name: Leaf Term Flag
Level.description: Filters glossary terms to leaf-only or non-leaf nodes. (technical: uses leaf_flag_key and leaf_flag_label.)

Level.name: Data Source Type
Level.description: Groups sources by platform or system type. (technical: uses datasource_type.)

Level.name: Data Source
Level.description: Identifies each source system. (technical: uses datasource_key and datasource_name.)

Level.name: Year
Level.description: Rolls up dates at the year level. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Year-Month
Level.description: Year and month as 2026-Jan. Sorts by year_month_number (2026-01). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name (Jan, Feb, ...). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Month
Level.description: Rolls up dates at the month number (1-12). (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Date
Level.description: Shows the specific calendar date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Name
Level.caption: Name
Level.description: Displays the business‑friendly entity name. (technical: uses entity_name.)

Level.name: Type
Level.caption: Type
Level.description: Classifies entities (e.g., table, file, report). (technical: uses entity_type.)

Level.name: Resource Type
Level.caption: Resource Type
Level.description: Groups entities by storage or system resource type. (technical: uses resource_type.)

Level.name: Path
Level.description: Shows the full hierarchical location of the entity. (technical: uses path.)

Level.name: Parent Path
Level.caption: Parent Path
Level.description: Shows the parent container path for navigation. (technical: uses parent_path.)

Level.name: Owner
Level.description: Shows the accountable owner of the entity. (technical: uses owner_name.)

Level.name: Group
Level.description: Shows the owning or access group. (technical: uses group_name.)

Level.name: File Type
Level.caption: File Type
Level.description: Shows the file format or object type. (technical: uses filetype.)

Level.name: File Extension
Level.caption: File Extension
Level.description: Shows the file extension (e.g., csv, parquet). (technical: uses file_extension.)

Level.name: Path Type
Level.caption: Path Type
Level.description: Describes the path classification (e.g., file, folder). (technical: uses path_type.)

Level.name: Schema
Level.description: Schema name for structured assets. (technical: uses structured_schema.)

Level.name: Table
Level.description: Table name within the schema. (technical: uses structured_table.)

Level.name: Schema.Table.Column
Level.description: Schema, table, and column on one line. (technical: uses structured_fqdn.)

Level.name: Level 1
Level.description: Top‑level folder in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_1.)

Level.name: Level 2
Level.description: Second folder level in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_2.)

Level.name: Level 3
Level.description: Third folder level in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_3.)

Level.name: Level 4
Level.description: Fourth folder level in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_4.)

Level.name: Level 5
Level.description: Fifth folder level in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_5.)

Level.name: Level 6
Level.description: Sixth folder level in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_level_6.)

Level.name: Leaf
Level.description: Leaf file or folder name in the unstructured path. (technical: uses unstructured_leaf.)

Level.name: FQDN
Level.description: Shows the fully qualified identifier of the entity. (technical: uses entity_fqdn.)

Level.name: URL
Level.description: Links to the entity’s source location. (technical: uses url.)

Level.name: Physical Location
Level.description: Shows the physical storage location. (technical: uses physicallocation.)

Level.name: Policy Type
Level.description: Top-level policy classification. (technical: uses policy_type.)

Level.name: Policy Level 1
Level.description: Policy hierarchy level 1. (technical: uses policy_level_1.)

Level.name: Policy Level 2
Level.description: Policy hierarchy level 2. (technical: uses policy_level_2.)

Level.name: Policy
Level.description: Specific governance policy. (technical: uses policy_key, policy_name.)

Level.name: Application Type
Level.description: Application classification. (technical: uses application_type.)

Level.name: Application
Level.description: Application accessing data. (technical: uses application_key, application_name.)

Level.name: Extension Category
Level.description: File extension category bucket. (technical: uses extension_category.)

Level.name: Extension
Level.description: Specific file extension. (technical: uses extension_key, extension_name.)

Level.name: Temperature
Level.description: Hot / Warm / Cold / Frozen access frequency. (technical: uses temperature_key, temperature_name.)

Level.name: Currency
Level.description: ISO currency symbol. (technical: uses currency_key, currency_symbol.)

Level.name: Status
Level.description: Pipeline-run status. (technical: uses status_key, status_name.)

Level.name: Scanned Year
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Scanned Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Scanned Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for scan date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Scanned Month
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Scanned Date
Level.description: Shows the scan date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Last Update Year
Level.description: Rolls up last update dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Last Update Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up last update dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Last Update Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for last update date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Last Update Month
Level.description: Rolls up last update dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Last Update Date
Level.description: Shows the last update date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Last Update Statistics Year
Level.description: Rolls up last statistics update dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Last Update Statistics Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up last statistics update dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Last Update Statistics Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for last statistics update date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Last Update Statistics Month
Level.description: Rolls up last statistics update dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Last Update Statistics Date
Level.description: Shows the last statistics update date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Accessed Age Months
Level.description: Months since last access at scan time. (technical: uses accessed_age_months.)

Level.name: Accessed Age Years
Level.description: Years since last access at scan time. (technical: uses accessed_age_years.)

Level.name: Modified Age Months
Level.caption: Modified Age Months
Level.description: Months since last modification at scan time. (technical: uses modified_age_months.)

Level.name: Modified Age Years
Level.caption: Modified Age Years
Level.description: Years since last modification at scan time. (technical: uses modified_age_years.)

Level.name: Created Age Months
Level.description: Months since creation at scan time. (technical: uses created_age_months.)

Level.name: Created Age Years
Level.description: Years since creation at scan time. (technical: uses created_age_years.)

Level.name: Accessed Age Band
Level.description: Buckets assets by age since last access at scan time. (technical: uses accessed_age_band.)

Level.name: Modified Age Band
Level.description: Buckets assets by age since last modification at scan time. (technical: uses modified_age_band.)

Level.name: Created Age Band
Level.description: Buckets assets by age since creation at scan time. (technical: uses created_age_band.)

Level.name: Scan Freshness Band
Level.description: Buckets catalog assets by scan recency. (technical: uses scan_freshness_band.)

Level.name: Metadata Update Freshness Band
Level.description: Buckets catalog assets by metadata update recency. (technical: uses metadata_update_freshness_band.)

Level.name: Statistics Freshness Band
Level.description: Buckets catalog assets by statistics update recency. (technical: uses statistics_freshness_band.)

Level.name: Governance Coverage Status
Level.description: Shows whether an entity has at least one term assignment. (technical: uses governance_coverage_status.)

Level.name: Metadata Completeness Band
Level.description: Buckets catalog assets by completeness of core metadata fields. (technical: uses metadata_completeness_band.)

Measure.name: Entity Count
Measure.caption: Number of Objects
Measure.description: Counts catalog objects in the snapshot. (technical: uses entity_count.)

Measure.name: Governed Entity Count
Measure.description: Counts entities with at least one term assignment. (technical: uses governed_entity_count.)

Measure.name: Ungoverned Entity Count
Measure.description: Counts entities without any term assignment. (technical: uses ungoverned_entity_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Owner Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing owner metadata. (technical: uses missing_owner_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Group Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing group metadata. (technical: uses missing_group_count.)

Measure.name: Missing File Type Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing file type metadata. (technical: uses missing_filetype_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Path Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing path metadata. (technical: uses missing_path_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Created Date Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing created date metadata. (technical: uses missing_created_date_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Modified Date Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing modified date metadata. (technical: uses missing_modified_date_count.)

Measure.name: Missing Accessed Date Count
Measure.description: Counts entities missing accessed date metadata. (technical: uses missing_accessed_date_count.)

Measure.name: Metadata Completed Fields
Measure.description: Counts completed core metadata fields across entities. (technical: uses metadata_completed_field_count.)

Measure.name: Metadata Expected Fields
Measure.description: Counts expected core metadata fields across entities. (technical: uses metadata_expected_field_count.)

Measure.name: Storage - Size Bytes
Measure.caption: Storage - Size Bytes
Measure.description: Raw storage size in bytes. (technical: uses bytes.)

Measure.name: Storage - Number of Child Directories
Measure.description: Immediate child directory count. (technical: uses child_dirs.)

Measure.name: Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes
Measure.description: Immediate child directory size in bytes. (technical: uses child_dir_bytes.)

Measure.name: Storage - Number of Child Files
Measure.description: Immediate child file count. (technical: uses child_files.)

Measure.name: Storage - Child File Size Bytes
Measure.description: Immediate child file size in bytes. (technical: uses child_file_bytes.)

Measure.name: Storage - Total Number of Child Directories
Measure.description: Total descendant directory count. (technical: uses total_child_dirs.)

Measure.name: Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes
Measure.description: Total descendant directory size in bytes. (technical: uses total_child_dir_bytes.)

Measure.name: Storage - Total Number of Child Files
Measure.description: Total descendant file count. (technical: uses total_child_files.)

Measure.name: Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes
Measure.description: Total descendant file size in bytes. (technical: uses total_child_file_bytes.)

CalculatedMember.name: Governance Coverage %
CalculatedMember.description: Percent of catalog entities with at least one term assignment. (technical: Governed Entity Count / Entity Count.)

CalculatedMember.name: Metadata Completeness %
CalculatedMember.formula: IIF([Measures].[Metadata Expected Fields] = 0, 0, [Measures].[Metadata Completed Fields] / [Measures].[Metadata Expected Fields])
CalculatedMember.description: Percent completeness of core metadata fields. (technical: Metadata Completed Fields / Metadata Expected Fields.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Storage size in gigabytes for easier reading. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Storage size in terabytes for capacity reporting. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Average Object Size Bytes
CalculatedMember.description: Average bytes per object. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Entity Count], with zero guard.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Child Directory Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Child directory size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Child Directory Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Child directory size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Average Child Directory Size Bytes
CalculatedMember.formula: IIF([Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Directories] = 0, 0, [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Directories])
CalculatedMember.description: Average bytes per child directory. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Directories], with zero guard.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Child File Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Child file size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Child File Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Child file size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Average Child File Size Bytes
CalculatedMember.formula: IIF([Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Files] = 0, 0, [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Files])
CalculatedMember.description: Average bytes per child file. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Files], with zero guard.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Total Child Directory Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Total descendant directory size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Total Child Directory Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Total descendant directory size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Average Total Child Directory Size Bytes
CalculatedMember.formula: IIF([Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Directories] = 0, 0, [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Directories])
CalculatedMember.description: Average bytes per descendant directory. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Directories], with zero guard.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Total Child File Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Total descendant file size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Total Child File Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Total descendant file size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Storage - Average Total Child File Size Bytes
CalculatedMember.formula: IIF([Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Files] = 0, 0, [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Files])
CalculatedMember.description: Average bytes per descendant file. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes] / [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Files], with zero guard.)

CalculatedMember.name: Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)
CalculatedMember.description: Estimated annual CO2 emissions in metric tons. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Size TB] * 0.35.)

CalculatedMember.name: Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)
CalculatedMember.description: Estimated annual CO2 emissions in kilograms. (technical: [Measures].[Storage - Size GB] * 0.341796875.)

Level.name: Created Year
Level.description: Rolls up created dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Created Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up created dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Created Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for created date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Created Month
Level.description: Rolls up created dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Created Date
Level.description: Shows the creation date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Modified Year
Level.description: Rolls up modified dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Modified Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up modified dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Modified Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for modified date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Modified Month
Level.description: Rolls up modified dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Modified Date
Level.description: Shows the last modified date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Accessed Year
Level.description: Rolls up accessed dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Accessed Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up accessed dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Accessed Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for accessed date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Accessed Month
Level.description: Rolls up accessed dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Accessed Date
Level.description: Shows the last accessed date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Level.name: Scanned Year
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by year. (technical: uses year.)

Level.name: Scanned Year-Month
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by year-month (e.g., 2026-Jan). (technical: uses year_month_name, year_month_number.)

Level.name: Scanned Month Name
Level.description: Abbreviated month name for scan date (Jan, Feb, …). Sorts by month number. (technical: uses month_name, month.)

Level.name: Scanned Month
Level.description: Rolls up scan dates by month. (technical: uses month.)

Level.name: Scanned Date
Level.description: Shows the scan date. (technical: uses date_key and full_date.)

Measure.name: Entity–Term Associations
Measure.description: Counts entity‑to‑term links. (technical: uses association_count.)

Measure.name: Distinct Entities
Measure.description: Distinct entities across term assignments. (technical: distinct count of entity_key.)

Measure.name: Distinct Terms
Measure.description: Distinct terms used in assignments. (technical: distinct count of term_key.)

Measure.name: Term - Size Bytes
Measure.description: Storage size for entities assigned to each term. (technical: uses bytes.)

Measure.name: Term - Number of Child Directories
Measure.description: Immediate child directory count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses child_dirs.)

Measure.name: Term - Child Directory Size Bytes
Measure.description: Immediate child directory size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses child_dir_bytes.)

Measure.name: Term - Number of Child Files
Measure.description: Immediate child file count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses child_files.)

Measure.name: Term - Child File Size Bytes
Measure.description: Immediate child file size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses child_file_bytes.)

Measure.name: Term - Total Number of Child Directories
Measure.description: Total descendant directory count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses total_child_dirs.)

Measure.name: Term - Total Child Directory Size Bytes
Measure.description: Total descendant directory size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses total_child_dir_bytes.)

Measure.name: Term - Total Number of Child Files
Measure.description: Total descendant file count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses total_child_files.)

Measure.name: Term - Total Child File Size Bytes
Measure.description: Total descendant file size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses total_child_file_bytes.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned storage size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned storage size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Child Directory Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned child directory size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Child Directory Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned child directory size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Child File Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned child file size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Child File Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Child File Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned child file size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Child File Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Total Child Directory Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned total child directory size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Total Child Directory Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned total child directory size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Total Child Directory Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Total Child File Size GB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned total child file size in gigabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Total Child File Size Bytes] / 1073741824.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Total Child File Size TB
CalculatedMember.description: Term‑assigned total child file size in terabytes. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Total Child File Size Bytes] / 1099511627776.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)
CalculatedMember.description: Estimated annual CO2 emissions in metric tons for term‑assigned storage. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Size TB] * 0.35.)

CalculatedMember.name: Term - Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)
CalculatedMember.description: Estimated annual CO2 emissions in kilograms for term‑assigned storage. (technical: [Measures].[Term - Size GB] * 0.341796875.)

Measure.name: Policy Assignment Count
Measure.description: Count of entity-policy assignments. (technical: assignment_count.)

Measure.name: Governed Bytes
Measure.description: Bytes covered by policy. (technical: governed_bytes.)

Measure.name: Governed Size TB
Measure.description: TB covered by policy. (technical: governed_size_tb.)

Measure.name: Governed Cost USD
Measure.description: Annualized cost of governed storage. (technical: governed_cost_usd.)

CalculatedMember.name: Distinct Policy Entities
CalculatedMember.description: Count of distinct entities under any policy.

Measure.name: Access Count
Measure.description: App-to-entity access edges. (technical: access_count.)

Measure.name: Accessed Bytes
Measure.description: Bytes touched by applications. (technical: accessed_bytes.)

Measure.name: Accessed Size TB
Measure.description: TB touched by applications. (technical: accessed_size_tb.)

Measure.name: Accessed Cost USD
Measure.description: Annualized cost of app-touched storage. (technical: accessed_cost_usd.)

Level.name: Data Source Type
Level.description: Source platform of the duplicate group.

Level.name: Resource Type
Level.description: Resource type of the duplicate group.

Level.name: Category
Level.description: Category of the duplicate group.

Level.name: Original Path
Level.description: Original path retained.

Measure.name: Duplicate Group Count
Measure.description: Distinct duplicate groups.

Measure.name: Duplicate File Count
Measure.description: Total redundant copies across groups.

Measure.name: Savings Size TB
Measure.description: TB that could be reclaimed.

Measure.name: Savings Cost USD
Measure.description: Annualized $ savings if duplicates removed.

Measure.name: Run Count
Measure.description: Pipeline runs.

Measure.name: Runtime Seconds
Measure.description: Total runtime in seconds.

Measure.name: Success Runs
Measure.description: Successful runs.

Measure.name: Failure Runs
Measure.description: Failed runs.

CalculatedMember.name: Success Rate %
CalculatedMember.description: Successful runs ÷ total runs.

CalculatedMember.name: Average Runtime Seconds
CalculatedMember.description: Avg seconds per run.

Measure.name: Extension File Count
Measure.description: Files of this extension on this day.

Measure.name: Temperature File Count
Measure.description: Files at this temperature on this day.

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Data Source
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Grouping by system and type. (technical: uses Data Source dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Scanned Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time‑based analysis by scan date. (technical: uses Scanned Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Term
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Grouping by glossary terms. (technical: uses Term dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Leaf Term Flag
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Filter to leaf-only glossary terms. (technical: uses Leaf Term Flag dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Created Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time slicing by assignment created date. (technical: uses Created Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Modified Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time slicing by assignment modified date. (technical: uses Modified Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Accessed Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time slicing by assignment accessed date. (technical: uses Accessed Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Last Update Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time slicing by last update date. (technical: uses Last Update Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Last Update Statistics Date
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Time slicing by last statistics update date. (technical: uses Last Update Statistics Date dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Name
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Friendly entity name for display. (technical: uses Name attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Type
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Entity type for grouping. (technical: uses Type attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Resource Type
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Resource type for grouping by storage or system. (technical: uses Resource Type attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Path
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Hierarchical path for navigation. (technical: uses Path attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Parent Path
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Parent container path for navigation. (technical: uses Parent Path attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Owner
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Accountable owner for the entity. (technical: uses Owner attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Group
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Owning or access group. (technical: uses Group attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: File Type
VirtualCubeDimension.description: File type or format grouping. (technical: uses File Type attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: File Extension
VirtualCubeDimension.description: File extension grouping. (technical: uses File Extension attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Path Type
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Path classification (file, folder, etc.). (technical: uses Path Type attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Structured Data Attributes
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Structured schema/table/column drill hierarchy. (technical: uses Structured Data Attributes dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Unstructured Path Attributes
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Unstructured path levels and leaf. (technical: uses Unstructured Path Attributes dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: FQDN
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Fully qualified identifier. (technical: uses FQDN attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: URL
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Source URL for navigation. (technical: uses URL attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Physical Location
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Physical storage context. (technical: uses Physical Location attribute dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Accessed Age Months
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Months since last access at scan time. (technical: uses Accessed Age Months dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Accessed Age Years
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Years since last access at scan time. (technical: uses Accessed Age Years dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Modified Age Months
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Months since last modification at scan time. (technical: uses Modified Age Months dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Modified Age Years
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Years since last modification at scan time. (technical: uses Modified Age Years dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Created Age Months
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Months since creation at scan time. (technical: uses Created Age Months dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Created Age Years
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Years since creation at scan time. (technical: uses Created Age Years dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Accessed Age Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Lifecycle bucket based on last access. (technical: uses Accessed Age Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Modified Age Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Lifecycle bucket based on last modification. (technical: uses Modified Age Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Created Age Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Lifecycle bucket based on creation date. (technical: uses Created Age Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Scan Freshness Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Operational scan freshness bucket. (technical: uses Scan Freshness Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Metadata Update Freshness Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Operational metadata update freshness bucket. (technical: uses Metadata Update Freshness Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Statistics Freshness Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Operational statistics freshness bucket. (technical: uses Statistics Freshness Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Governance Coverage Status
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Tagged vs untagged coverage status. (technical: uses Governance Coverage Status dimension.)

VirtualCubeDimension.name: Metadata Completeness Band
VirtualCubeDimension.description: Core metadata completeness bucket. (technical: uses Metadata Completeness Band dimension.)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Entity Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts catalog objects. (technical: uses [Measures].[Entity Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Governed Entity Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities with at least one term assignment. (technical: uses [Measures].[Governed Entity Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Ungoverned Entity Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities without any term assignment. (technical: uses [Measures].[Ungoverned Entity Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Governance Coverage %]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Percent of catalog entities with at least one term assignment. (technical: uses [Measures].[Governance Coverage %].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Owner Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing owner metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Owner Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Group Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing group metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Group Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing File Type Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing file type metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing File Type Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Path Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing path metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Path Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Created Date Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing created date metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Created Date Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Modified Date Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing modified date metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Modified Date Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Missing Accessed Date Count]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entities missing accessed date metadata. (technical: uses [Measures].[Missing Accessed Date Count].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Metadata Completed Fields]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts completed core metadata fields. (technical: uses [Measures].[Metadata Completed Fields].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Metadata Expected Fields]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts expected core metadata fields. (technical: uses [Measures].[Metadata Expected Fields].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Metadata Completeness %]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Percent completeness of core metadata fields. (technical: uses [Measures].[Metadata Completeness %].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total storage size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Directories]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child directory count. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Directories].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child directory size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Child Directory Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Files]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child file count. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Number of Child Files].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child file size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Child File Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Directories]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant directory count. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Directories].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant directory size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Total Child Directory Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Files]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant file count. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Total Number of Child Files].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant file size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Total Child File Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Size GB]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Storage size in gigabytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Size GB].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Size TB]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Storage size in terabytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Size TB].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Storage - Average Object Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Average object size in bytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Storage - Average Object Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Estimated annual CO2e in metric tons. (technical: uses [Measures].[Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Estimated annual CO2e in kilograms. (technical: uses [Measures].[Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Entity–Term Associations]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Counts entity‑to‑term associations. (technical: uses [Measures].[Entity–Term Associations].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Distinct Entities]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Distinct entities participating in term assignments. (technical: uses [Measures].[Distinct Entities].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Distinct Terms]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Distinct terms used in assignments. (technical: uses [Measures].[Distinct Terms].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total size in bytes for entities assigned to each term. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Size GB]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Term‑assigned size in gigabytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Size GB].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Size TB]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Term‑assigned size in terabytes. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Size TB].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Number of Child Directories]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child directory count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Number of Child Directories].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Child Directory Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Child directory size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Child Directory Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Number of Child Files]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Immediate child file count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Number of Child Files].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Child File Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Child file size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Child File Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Total Number of Child Directories]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant directory count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Total Number of Child Directories].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Total Child Directory Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant directory size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Total Child Directory Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Total Number of Child Files]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant file count for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Total Number of Child Files].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Total Child File Size Bytes]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Total descendant file size in bytes for term‑assigned entities. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Total Child File Size Bytes].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Estimated annual CO2e in metric tons for term‑assigned storage. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Estimated CO2e (Metric Tons/Year)].)

VirtualCubeMeasure.name: [Measures].[Term - Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)]
VirtualCubeMeasure.description: Estimated annual CO2e in kilograms for term‑assigned storage. (technical: uses [Measures].[Term - Estimated CO2e (kg/Year)].)
